attempts.insight: Mathlib has only the ascent direction R→A; the descent A→R needed by the tile lemma is ABSENT — must be built project-local.

attempts.strategy: Prove map_units clause by rewriting (algebraMap R A f)^k to fun-form then matching the smul
attempts.code_tried: rw on (fun x => (algebraMap R A) f ^ x) k inside map_units goal
attempts.lean_error: Tactic rewrite failed: did not find pattern (fun x => (algebraMap R A) f ^ x) k in target (algebraMap R A) f ^ k • y = φ m
attempts.insight: Pointwise pow-of-algebraMap rewrite doesn't match; reduce map_units to base-independent bijectivity via Module.End.isUnit_iff instead.

attempts.strategy: Discharge all three IsLocalizedModule clauses directly: map_units via Module.End.isUnit_iff, surj/exists via (algebraMap R A f)^k•x = f^k•x (algebraMap_smul+map_pow scalar tower)
attempts.code_tried: constructor over the 3 clauses using Module.End.isUnit_iff + algebraMap_smul + map_pow
attempts.insight: isUnit of the End is base-independent; the scalar-tower identity bridges powers(algebraMap R A f) over A to powers f over R. axioms = {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}.

next_steps: Done. This is ingredient #4 (base-ring descent) of tile_section_localization; ingredient #3 (section comparison, Sub-lemma B) remains.

findings.blocker: Step 3 (reconcile Γ_{R_g}(⊤,tile) with Γ_R(D(g),F) etc.) is NOT restrict_obj-rfl. modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (global ring R) does NOT commute with restrict definitionally; carriers verified NOT defeq by run_code. Needs a ~100-150 LOC section-comparison lemma (Sub-lemma B) + an opens-identity lemma (Sub-lemma A). Left ABSENT (no sorry), per mathlib-build invariant.

attempts.strategy: Test whether the tile carrier equals the F-section carrier definitionally (the objective's 'wiring via restrict_obj-rfl' premise)
attempts.code_tried: rfl between ↥((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (modulesRestrictBasicOpen g F)).presheaf.obj (op ⊤)) and ↥((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj F).presheaf.obj (op (specBasicOpen g)))
attempts.lean_error: Tactic rfl failed: the left-hand side ...modulesSpecToSheaf...modulesRestrictBasicOpen g F...obj (op ⊤) is not definitionally equal to the right-hand side
attempts.insight: The objective premise is FALSE. restrict_obj-rfl is for SheafOfModules Γ(M,-) (local ring Γ(U,O)); modulesSpecToSheaf.obj is a different functor (restrictScalars to global ring R) and does NOT commute with restrict definitionally. Carriers differ by base ring (R_g vs R) AND open (image-open vs specBasicOpen g).

attempts.strategy: Inspect modulesSpecToSheaf / restrict_obj source to scope the reconciliation
attempts.code_tried: Read Mathlib Modules/Sheaf.lean (restrictFunctor/restrict_obj) + Tilde.lean (modulesSpecToSheaf); grep restrict defs
attempts.insight: restrict_obj : Γ(M.restrict f,U)=Γ(M,f ''ᵁ U) is rfl but at SheafOfModules level (ModuleCat (Γ(U,O))). Decomposed remaining gap into Sub-lemma A (opens identities) + Sub-lemma B (modulesSpecToSheaf∘restrict section comparison, R_g-linear, intertwining restriction).

next_steps: Build Sub-lemma A (opens identities: (specBasicOpen g).ι ''ᵁ ((basicOpenIsoSpecAway g).inv ''ᵁ ⊤) = specBasicOpen g, and the D(gf) version) + Sub-lemma B (section comparison iso, ~100-150 LOC), then assemble with section_isLocalizedModule_of_presentation + isLocalizedModule_powers_restrictScalars_of_algebraMap.
